title: proc_prune sometimes does invalid assignment promotions leading to multiply-driven wires

features.name: overlapping full and partial bit-range assignments in process
features.description: Code should include a full wire assignment and a partial bit-range assignment to the same wire within a process, where the partial assignment overlaps with a subset of the full assignment bits

features.name: conditional partial assignment in switch statement
features.description: Code should include a conditional partial bit assignment inside a switch statement that overlaps with other assignments to the same wire

features.name: process with multiple overlapping assignments to same wire
features.description: Code should include a process block containing multiple assignments targeting overlapping bit ranges of the same wire, including full and partial assignments
features.snippet:
process p
  assign nq a
  assign nq [1:0] b
  switch en
    case 1'b1
      assign nq [3] 1'b0
  end
  sync posedge clk
    update q nq
end
